name: Friendship Cake-Amish
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------
1. Prepare the brandied fruit starter: Combine 15 1/2 oz (1 can) pineapple chunks, 16 oz (1 can) sliced peaches, 17 oz (1 can) apricot halves, and 10 oz (1 jar) maraschino cherries in a clean, nonmetallic bowl. Stir in 1 1/4 cups sugar and 1 1/4 cups brandy. Cover and let stand at room temperature for 3 weeks, stirring twice per week.
2. As you use the brandied fruit, replace the amount taken with 1 cup sugar. After 3 days of standing, mix well with the remaining ingredients.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine melted butter and sugar. Beat until smooth.
4. Add flour, baking soda, cinnamon, salt, cloves, and nutmeg to the dry mixture. Stir until combined.
5. Add eggs to the mixture and beat until just incorporated.
6. Fold in the chopped pecans and brandied fruit juice.
7. Pour the batter into a well-greased 10-inch bundt pan.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing it and letting it fully cool on a wire rack.
Brandied Fruit Starter:
- Drain all canned fruit from the brandied fruit mixture.
- Combine the remaining ingredients (pumpkin, sugar, brandy) in a clean, nonmetallic bowl. Stir gently.
- Cover and let stand at room temperature for 3 weeks, stirring twice per week.
- Replace used amounts with 1 cup sugar as needed.
- After 3 days of standing, mix well with the remaining ingredients.
